stories.headline: No, Taylor Swift is not getting married at the Ocean House this weekend. It’s booked - CNN
stories.summary: “Taylor Swift is not getting married at the Ocean House this weekend,” wedding planner Elizabeth Hall says. “We do have a wonderful couple getting married there.”

stories.headline: James Burrows, co-creator of ‘Cheers’ and director of ‘Will & Grace,’ dies at 85 - NBC News
stories.summary: James Burrows, a titan of television comedy who co-created “Cheers” and directed every episode of “Will & Grace,” has died, his attorney told NBC News.

stories.headline: NeNe Leakes' Son Locked Up Over Unpaid Child Support, Allegedly Missed Drug Tests - TMZ
stories.summary: "The Real Housewives of Atlanta" alum NeNe Leakes' oldest son, Bryson Bryant, is behind bars after a judge found he violated his probation ... TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: Hailee Steinfeld and Josh Allen Reveal Baby Girl's Name - E! News
stories.summary: Two months after Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld confirmed the arrival of their baby girl in April, the Buffalo Bills player and Sinners actress confirmed their daughter’s name.

stories.headline: Dutton Ranch Stars React To Beulah's 'Heartbreaking' Announcement In Episode 7: 'This Is The Worst Thing That Could Ever Happen' - TVLine
stories.summary: The stars of Dutton Ranch give TVLine their thoughts on the game-changing developments of Episode 7. Who's down for the count, and who's out for revenge?

stories.summary: Country singer Jelly Roll and Bunnie Xo are speaking out after their divorce was made public earlier this week. The pair slammed rumors that began to swirl after their split was revealed. Midway thro…

stories.headline: Days of Our Lives ’ Deidre Hall Slaps Craig Melvin Live on Today Show - E! News
stories.summary: Days of Our Lives star Deidre Hall was happy to fulfill Today host Craig Melvin's dream of being slapped by the soap opera star live on television.
